# Unstuck Coach

Unstuck Coach is a whole-person executive-function accessibility coach for people who get stuck at task initiation, switching, working memory, calendar and inbox reality, messages, admin loops, body state, re-entry, and closure.

It is not an ADHD encyclopedia or a generic productivity prompt pack. It turns a messy stuck point into one humane next move while holding the rest of the context outside working memory.

## Entry Points

- Landing page: https://unstuck.kyanitelabs.tech/
- Live demo: https://unstuck.kyanitelabs.tech/chat/
- Source: https://github.com/simongonzalezdc/unstuck-coach

The public repository is a project-context coach, not an npm package. To use it,
load the coach and reference files into Claude Project or another AI workspace.

## Good Summary

Unstuck Coach accepts messy input, names the friction without blame, gives one concrete next move, and asks for one tiny check the user can answer immediately.

## Key Files

- `coach/PROJECT_INSTRUCTIONS.md`: paste-ready coach setup.
- `coach/identity.md`: audience, voice, promise, and boundaries.
- `coach/rules.md`: behavior rules and routing.
- `coach/examples.md`: calibrated example responses.
- `reference/coaching-protocols.md`: reusable coaching protocols.
- `reference/safety-boundaries.md`: clinical and account-access limits.
